lean_goal: ∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => f (γ s)) (⟪gradient f (γ t), y - x⟫_ℝ) t
atom_nl: By chain rule, t ↦ f (γ t) has derivative ⟪gradient f (γ t), y - x⟫ at every t.
tier2_tried: needs HasFDerivAt.comp + Riesz representation linking gradient_def : gradient f x = (innerSL ℝ).symm (fderiv ℝ f x)

lean_goal: f y - f x = ∫ t in (0:ℝ)..1, ⟪gradient f (γ t), y - x⟫_ℝ
atom_nl: By FTC, f(y) - f(x) = ∫₀¹ ⟪gradient f (γ t), y - x⟫ dt

lean_goal: (∫ t in (0:ℝ)..1, ⟪gradient f x, y - x⟫_ℝ + ⟪gradient f (γ t) - gradient f x, y - x⟫_ℝ) = (∫ _t in (0:ℝ)..1, ⟪gradient f x, y - x⟫_ℝ) + ∫ t in (0:ℝ)..1, ⟪gradient f (γ t) - gradient f x, y - x⟫_ℝ
(∫ t in (0:ℝ)..1, ⟪gradient f (γ t) - gradient f x, y - x⟫_ℝ) ≤ (L : ℝ) / 2 * ‖y - x‖^2
tier2_tried: needs integral monotonicity + h6 (CS) + h7 (Lipschitz) + ∫₀¹ t dt = 1/2 + integrability of intermediate step

lean_goal: shbIter β η f' x₀ xPrev (t + 1) - shbIter ... t = -η • f' (...) + β • (... - ...)
error: abel can't reconcile -1 • η • f'(...) (right-assoc, -1 is Z-scalar acting on E) with (-1 • η) • f'(...) (-1 is Z-scalar acting on η:ℝ then product acts on E)
fix: Restate target as `β • (... - ...) - η • f' (...)` (binary subtraction form) — abel succeeds with no Z/ℝ scalar mixing
context: precedence quirk of `•` (right-assoc, prec 73) interacting with unary `-`
